title: GuardrailValueUpdater
content:
# GuardrailValueUpdater

Limiting value definitions.


## Properties

- **source** (`string`): Asset / Data Stream pair used to determine the values for the minimum and maximum guardrail values.
- **inclusive** (`boolean`): The Asset / Data Stream pair value is inclusive within the allowable range.

source.description: Asset / Data Stream pair used to determine the values for the minimum and maximum guardrail values.

inclusive.description: The Asset / Data Stream pair value is inclusive within the allowable range.
